description.description: Description of the HA VPN gateway, used for identification and documentation purposes.

gateway_ip_version.description: Specifies the IP version for the VPN gateway, either IPv4 or IPv6.

labels.description: Key-value pairs to organize and categorize the VPN gateway, such as by environment or team; must comply with GCP label naming conventions.

name.description: Name of the HA VPN gateway, must be unique within the project and region.

network.description: Specifies the network to which the HA VPN gateway belongs; must be an existing network in the same project and region.

stack_type.description: Defines the deployment stack type, such as production, staging, or development, to distinguish environments for the HA VPN gateway.

timeouts.description: Specifies timeout settings for creating, updating, and deleting the HA VPN gateway.

vpn_interfaces.description: Defines the configuration of interfaces for the HA VPN gateway, including their associated IP addresses and peer VPN gateway connections; requires at least one interface and supports up to two.
